description: Add a new video to an existing project that already has config and flows
query: Document the dashboard section of my app. The project is at /home/user/projects/demo-app and already has .video-docs configured.
expected_behavior: Reads /home/user/projects/demo-app/.video-docs/config.json without asking for credentials again
Runs: npx tsx scripts/analyze-app.ts /home/user/projects/demo-app/.video-docs (or reads existing analysis if available)
Identifies the dashboard section and checks if a flow already exists
If no flow exists: reads screenshots from /home/user/projects/demo-app/.video-docs/analysis/screenshots/ before writing the flow JSON
Sets use_setup_login: true since this is not the login flow
Includes a navigate step with wait_for pointing to a CSS selector that confirms the dashboard has rendered
Offers to regenerate the docs site to include the new video
